heading: Limitation on compensation of Sergeant at Arms and Doorkeeper of Senate
label: 6592 Limitation on compensation of Sergeant at Arms and Doorkeeper of Senate
text: The Sergeant at Arms and Doorkeeper of the Senate shall receive, directly or indirectly, no fees or other compensation or emolument whatever for performing the duties of the office, or in connection therewith, other than the salary prescribed by law.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 62 of this title
